module.name: ibm-roks-license
module.description: Deploy the BIG-IP Next license custom resource after CNEInstance is ready.

required.reason: The license resource depends on CNEInstance CRDs and runtime components.

required.name: jwt_token
required.description: JWT token used to register the BIG-IP Next license.

optional.name: utils_namespace
optional.description: Namespace where the license custom resource is created.

optional.name: cneinstance_dependency
optional.description: Optional explicit CNEInstance dependency object used by the upstream module.

key_outputs.name: namespace
key_outputs.description: Namespace where the license resource is deployed.

key_outputs.name: license_name
key_outputs.description: Name of the deployed license custom resource.
